ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of contributor (e.g., individual, corporation) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the contributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the contributor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City part of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State part of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code part of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country part of the address */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the contributor */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Employer of the contributor */,
  "is_individual" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the contributor is an individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the contributor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the contributor record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office the recipient is running for */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the recipient */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the recipient */,
  "city" TEXT /* City part of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State part of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code part of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country part of the address */,
  "is_incumbent" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the recipient is an incumbent */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the recipient's campaign website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the recipient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the recipient record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipients_election_year FOREIGN KEY ("election_year") REFERENCES elections ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "pac_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PAC, if applicable */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description or note about the contribution */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the contribution is anonymous */,
  "is_in_kind" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the contribution is in-kind (non-monetary) */,
  "in_kind_description" TEXT /* Description of the in-kind contribution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the contribution record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the contribution record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_pac_id FOREIGN KEY ("pac_id") REFERENCES pacs ("pac_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pacs" (
  "pac_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PAC */,
  "pac_name" TEXT /* Name of the PAC */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the PAC was registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the PAC (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the PAC */,
  "city" TEXT /* City part of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State part of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code part of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country part of the address */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the PAC record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the PAC record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pac_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the election is held */,
  "is_special_election" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the election is a special election */,
  "primary_date" TEXT /* Date of the primary election, if applicable */,
  "general_date" TEXT /* Date of the general election */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the election record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the election record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)
